testCases: TC1: input { param1: 10, param2: 20, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { total: 12, breakdown: { baseRate: 10, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 1.2, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 12, isCapped: false } }

TC2: input { param1: 10, param2: 20, param3: "common", param4: true } → output { total: 18, breakdown: { baseRate: 10, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 1.2, boostMultiplier: 1.5, finalChance: 18, isCapped: false } }

TC3: input { param1: 100, param2: 0, param3: "legendary", param4: false } → output { total: 10, breakdown: { baseRate: 100, qualityMultiplier: 0.1, luckMultiplier: 1, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 10, isCapped: false } }

TC4: input { param1: 50, param2: 100, param3: "rare", param4: true } → output { total: 75, breakdown: { baseRate: 50, qualityMultiplier: 0.5, luckMultiplier: 2, boostMultiplier: 1.5, finalChance: 75, isCapped: false } }

TC5: input { param1: 80, param2: 50, param3: "epic", param4: false } → output { total: 24, breakdown: { baseRate: 80, qualityMultiplier: 0.2, luckMultiplier: 1.5, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 24, isCapped: false } }

TC6: input { param1: 0, param2: 50, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { total: 0, breakdown: { baseRate: 0, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 1.5, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 0, isCapped: false } }
TC7: input { param1: 150, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param1 must be <= 100" }
TC8: input { param1: -10, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param1 must be >= 0" }
TC9: input { param1: "abc", param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param1 must be a number" }
TC10: input { param1: NaN, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param1 must be a number" }
TC11: input { param1: 10, param2: -5, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param2 must be >= 0" }
TC12: input { param1: 10, param2: 101, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param2 must be <= 100" }
TC13: input { param1: 10, param2: null, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { error: "param2 is required" }
TC14: input { param1: 10, param2: 0, param3: "mythic", param4: false } → output { error: "param3 must be one of: common, rare, epic, legendary" }
TC15: input { param1: 10, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: "yes" } → output { error: "param4 must be a boolean" }

TC16: input { param1: 80, param2: 100, param3: "common", param4: true } → output { total: 100, breakdown: { baseRate: 80, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 2, boostMultiplier: 1.5, finalChance: 100, isCapped: true } }

TC17: input { param1: 0.1, param2: 0, param3: "legendary", param4: false } → output { total: 0.01, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.1, qualityMultiplier: 0.1, luckMultiplier: 1, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 0.01, isCapped: false } }
TC18: input {} → output { error: "param1 is required; param2 is required; param3 is required; param4 is required" }

TC19: input { param1: 30, param2: 25, param3: "rare", param4: true } → output { total: 28.125, breakdown: { baseRate: 30, qualityMultiplier: 0.5, luckMultiplier: 1.25, boostMultiplier: 1.5, finalChance: 28.125, isCapped: false } }

TC20: input { param1: 50, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: false } → output { total: 50, breakdown: { baseRate: 50, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 1, boostMultiplier: 1, finalChance: 50, isCapped: false } }

TC21: input { param1: 50, param2: 0, param3: "common", param4: true } → output { total: 75, breakdown: { baseRate: 50, qualityMultiplier: 1, luckMultiplier: 1, boostMultiplier: 1.5, finalChance: 75, isCapped: false } }
